meta.title: Şimşek Solar — Solar Thermal Systems | A Şimşek Group Company
meta.description: 35 years from Mersin to the world: Orion collectors, Aquarious enameled boilers, Helios package systems and smart monitoring. Engineering under one roof, from production to field installation.

hero.titleLine2: and carry it to the future.
hero.subtitle: With over 35 years of manufacturing expertise, Şimşek Solar designs and produces solar thermal systems at its integrated plants in Mersin and delivers them worldwide. The entire value chain — from R&D and production to project engineering and after-sales service — is managed under one roof.

group.title: One vision, four forces
group.body: Şimşek Solar is part of Şimşek Group. Four companies completing each other under one holding: every link of the chain — from production to installation, energy to materials — in our own hands.

companies.name: Şimşek Solar
companies.desc: One of Türkiye's most established solar thermal manufacturers with over 35 years of expertise. Orion collectors, Aquarious boilers and Helios package systems — end-to-end engineering from R&D and production to projects and after-sales.

companies.name: Lipus
companies.desc: Develops smart home systems with the Zero Carbon House vision: zero-carbon living spaces that generate, store and intelligently manage their own solar energy.

companies.name: Şimşek Renewables
companies.desc: Sales, service and contracting in renewable energy from a single source: solar plant engineering, turnkey installation, periodic maintenance and operation.

companies.name: SMK Aluminum
companies.desc: Both an aluminum profile manufacturer and an industrial material supply company: a single point of supply for the group's and the industry's aluminum and material needs.

lines: We turn sunlight into tomorrow's energy.
vision.footer: The power we take from nature, we craft with quality, responsibility, and 35 years of engineering.

anatomy.title: Assembly of an Orion panel
anatomy.body: From the real SolidWorks solid model: as you scroll, the Orion collector is built layer by layer, ending in a full exploded view of every component.

layers.name: Rock wool insulation
layers.spec: 45 mm — class A1, against heat loss

layers.name: Selective absorber
layers.spec: Ti-N coating — α ≥ 95%, copper harp tubes

production.title: Every step of production in-house
production.body: At its integrated plants in Mersin, Şimşek Solar runs the entire production process under its own roof, from raw material intake to packaging. Bringing the enamel kiln, CNC tube bending, laser cutting and aluminum profile lines together on a single campus combines high capacity with consistent quality, short lead times and competitive cost. Every product passes quality control stations before reaching the field.

calculator.title: System sizing and calculation report
calculator.subtitle: Size the right collector and boiler capacity for your consumption and get your report.
calculator.soonBody: Our sizing and calculation report tool will be embedded on this page. Until then, our team can run the calculation for you via the quote form.

projectsMap.title: 449 projects in 71 provinces, 30,000+ homes
projectsMap.subtitle: From our production base in Mersin across Türkiye and into export markets: the footprint of our completed projects.

productsSection.subtitle: Orion collectors, Aquarious and Sirius boilers, central and package system mounting frames, automation and connection equipment.

wizard.resultCta: Request a quote for this system

results.helios-200l: The most balanced solution for a standard household: boiler + two collectors, turnkey package.
results.helios-300l: Extended capacity for high demand: pressurized package with three collectors.
results.central: At this scale we engineer an Orion series collector field + Aquarious central boiler combination; our team prepares a quote with the capacity calculation.

items.title: Our own production plants
items.desc: From enamel coating to aluminum profiles, the whole process runs inside our group companies with no outsourcing.

items.title: Certified quality
items.desc: Our products pass CE, TSE and Solar Keymark testing, with every serial number traceable back to its production batch.

items.title: Project and field support
items.desc: Our engineering team works alongside you from project design through field installation and commissioning.

items.title: Smart systems
items.desc: With Şimşek.ai and our smart controllers, we monitor system performance remotely and optimize efficiency with data.

process.title: From your first request to commissioning

steps.title: Needs assessment
steps.desc: We size the right capacity together, based on your household or facility's hot water demand.

steps.title: Project and engineering
steps.desc: We prepare a detailed quote with a system layout, structural calculations, and technical drawings tailored to your site.

steps.title: Production and dispatch
steps.desc: Your order is manufactured at our Mersin plants and shipped with secure packaging.

steps.title: Field installation and monitoring
steps.desc: Our own field team completes installation, and can connect the system to remote monitoring on request.

certs.title: Quality certified to international standards
certs.subtitle: Our products and management systems are audited and certified by national and international accredited bodies.

projectsTeaser.title: From public institutions to hotels and export
projectsTeaser.subtitle: A selection of projects completed for military facilities, hotels, and export markets.

ctaBand.title: Let's find the right system for your project
ctaBand.subtitle: From capacity calculations to dealer applications, we'll send a tailored quote within 24 hours.

hero.title: From Mersin to the Mediterranean, and beyond
hero.subtitle: Şimşek Group is an independent Turkish group active for 35 years in solar thermal systems, renewables, energy storage, and aluminum production.

story.title: Our Story
story.body1: Founded to make use of Mersin's solar potential, Şimşek has grown into a four-company group with an annual capacity of thousands of units. Our purpose hasn't changed since day one: build systems that are durable, efficient, and cheap to maintain.
story.body2: Today our products serve military facilities, hotels, and housing developments, alongside a growing export presence. Our R&D team keeps refining every component, from absorber coating efficiency to the enamel formulation to our smart monitoring software.

items.title: Durability comes first
items.desc: We design every product from the user's perspective, not the manufacturer's — built to last for decades.

items.title: Transparent engineering
items.desc: Our technical sheets carry real tested values; we avoid inflated efficiency claims.

items.title: One roof, from production to technology
items.desc: We bring manufacturer, project engineer, field installer, and technology provider together under one roof.

facility.title: Our production plants
facility.body: Our plants house an enamel kiln, a CNC tube-bending line, laser cutting, an aluminum profile line and automated welding stations. Every step, from raw material intake to final packaging, passes through quality control checkpoints.

hero.title: Catalogs, drawings, and certificates in one place
hero.subtitle: For project engineers and dealers — technical files, CAD drawings, and certificates for every product family, in a single archive.

hero.title: Collectors, boilers, mounting frames and automation
hero.subtitle: Orion collector series, Aquarious and Sirius boilers, central and package system frames, automation panels and connection equipment.

products.requestQuote: Request a quote for this product
products.drawingsBody: 2D dimensioned drawings for installation and structural calculations.
products.cadBody: 3D models and CAD formats you can import directly into your project drawings.

orion-300.name: Orion 300 Series Solar Collector
orion-300.description: The Orion 300 uses 4mm tempered low-iron glass and a selective titanium-nitride coated absorber for high solar efficiency. Its anodized aluminum frame withstands the humid, salty air of coastal regions for the long run.
features: Selective coating with over 95% absorption
40mm rock wool insulation for minimal heat loss
Reinforced frame rated for wind and hail loads
Easy installation on residential and commercial roofs

orion-500.name: Orion 500 Series Solar Collector
orion-500.tagline: Large surface area for central systems and high-capacity projects
orion-500.description: The Orion 500 is built for central systems and large-scale projects with a wider absorber area. It delivers the same selective coating technology across a bigger surface, for higher energy output per panel.
features: Larger absorber area for higher output per panel
45mm rock wool insulation for minimal heat loss
Modular connection suited to central system projects
Proven durability on military and hotel installations

aquarious-500.name: Aquarious 500 Series Enameled Boiler
aquarious-500.description: The Aquarious 500 features a DIN 4753-compliant vitrified enamel interior that resists corrosion for the long term. Its dual-coil design lets solar energy and a backup heat source work together.
features: Vitrified enamel interior with superior corrosion resistance
Dual coil: solar plus backup heat source
Magnesium anode for additional cathodic protection
60mm PU foam insulation for low standby loss

aquarious-600.name: Aquarious 600 Series Enameled Boiler
aquarious-600.description: The Aquarious 600 is a high-capacity dual-coil boiler built for military facilities, hotels, and housing developments with heavy hot water demand.
features: 600-liter capacity for high consumption
Dual coil with flexible heat-source combinations
60mm PU foam insulation for minimal heat loss
Reinforced shell suitable for institutional and commercial use

helios-200l.name: Helios 200L Package System
helios-200l.tagline: Pressurized turnkey package for a 4-5 person household
helios-200l.description: This package combines a 200-liter enameled boiler with two Orion 300 flat-plate collectors, running on pressurized forced circulation, and is delivered turnkey with a mounting kit.
features: Boiler and collectors bundled together, guaranteed compatibility
Mounting kit and connection parts included
Pressurized system, works reliably in tall buildings
10-year boiler and 5-year collector warranty

helios-300l.name: Helios 300L Package System
helios-300l.tagline: Extended package for larger households and small facilities
helios-300l.description: This package combines a 300-liter enameled boiler with three Orion 300 flat-plate collectors, designed for households and small commercial sites with heavier hot water demand.
features: Extended collector area for higher output
Mounting kit and connection parts included
Pressurized system, flexible installation
10-year boiler and 5-year collector warranty

simsek-track.name: ŞimşekTrack Remote Monitoring
simsek-track.tagline: A smart platform tracking system performance in real time
simsek-track.description: ŞimşekTrack is a web and mobile dashboard tracking temperature, flow, and efficiency in real time. It sends automatic alerts to the field team on anomalies and delivers monthly production and savings reports in a ready-to-use format.
features: Real-time temperature, flow, and efficiency tracking
Automatic field-team alerts on anomalies
Monthly production, savings, and CO₂ reports
Direct integration with BMS/SCADA systems

akilli-kontrolor.name: Şimşek Smart Controller
akilli-kontrolor.tagline: A control unit managing backup heating with weather forecasts
akilli-kontrolor.description: The Şimşek Smart Controller automatically switches the backup heat source on or off based on weather forecasts and real-time temperature data, cutting energy consumption with data-driven control.
features: Forecast-assisted smart switching
Real-time temperature and sensor tracking
Boiler/combi backup heating integration
Fully compatible with the ŞimşekTrack platform

hero.title: Work in the field
hero.subtitle: Examples of work completed for military facilities, hotels, and export markets.

incirlik-sosyal-yasam-merkezi.title: İncirlik 10th Tanker Base Command Social Life Center
incirlik-sosyal-yasam-merkezi.description: A centralized solar-assisted hot water system for the social life center of a military facility; Aquarious series boilers were chosen for the high usage intensity.

alasehir-egitim-tabur-komutanligi.title: Alaşehir 1st Transportation Training Battalion Command
alasehir-egitim-tabur-komutanligi.description: A centralized system was installed for the training facility's central hot water needs, combining Orion series collectors with dual-coil boilers.

kara-harp-okulu.title: Turkish Military Academy
kara-harp-okulu.description: A high-capacity centralized system meets the institutional facility's hot water needs at a low operating cost.

sweet-maril-resort.title: Sweet Maril Resort Hotel
sweet-maril-resort.description: Uninterrupted hot water supply improving guest satisfaction at the hotel, with a discreet mounting solution custom-fit to the roof and terrace.

misir-fuar-2022.title: Egypt Export & Trade Fair Participation
misir-fuar-2022.description: We entered the regional market by exhibiting at a major industry fair in Egypt; regional distributorship discussions are ongoing since.

chat.subtitle: A smart assistant grounded in our documents and manuals
chat.greeting: Hi, I'm Şimşek.ai! I answer from our product manuals and technical documents. Ask me about Orion, Aquarious, Helios, or our smart systems.
chat.errorFallback: We couldn't connect right now. Please try again later or call us at +90 324 324 12 35.
